headline: What Could Push LLY Stock Higher From Here?
summary: While the market focuses on a single class of blockbuster drugs, a different story is unfolding inside the company. Lilly’s immunology, oncology, and neuroscience medicines are quietly compounding at a blistering pace. These other therapeutic areas collectively grew by 160% last quarter, a rate that suggests a much broader growth engine is taking shape.

headline: AtaiBeckley Stock Is Soaring 34% as Eli Lilly Agrees to Buy Psychedelic Drugmaker
summary: Psychedelic drugmaker  AtaiBeckley  was surging 34% ahead of the open Thursday after pharma giant  Eli Lilly  agreed a deal to buy the company.  AtaiBeckley shares were up 34.2% to $7.19 in premarket trading after the deal was confirmed.  Lilly will acquire AtaiBeckley for $6.75 per share in cash, plus up to $2.50 per share upon reaching certain developmental and regulatory milestones, the companies said in a press release.

Lilly will acquire AtaiBeckley for $6.75 per share in cash, plus up to $2.50 per share upon reaching certain developmental and regulatory milestones, the companies said in a press release.

headline: AtaiBeckley shares soar on reports of potential Eli Lilly takeover talks (ATAI)

Potential deal would broaden Lilly’s neuroscience portfolioAccording to BMO Capital Markets analyst Evan David Seigerman, an acquisition of AtaiBeckley would strengthen Eli Lilly’s presence in psychiatry while supporting its strategy of expanding beyond its established cardiometabolic business.

headline: This Psychedelic Pharma Stock Is Soaring 50% on Report of Eli Lilly Takeover Talks
summary: Psychedelic drugmaker  AtaiBeckley  was surging 50% ahead of the open Thursday following a report that pharma giant  Eli Lilly  is nearing a deal to buy the company .  A deal, being negotiated at a premium, could be announced as early as this week, Bloomberg reported, citing people familiar with the matter.  The shares jumped 22% in a single day in April when President Donald Trump signed a directive to accelerate the Food and Drug Administration’s review of psychedelic drugs for serious mental illnesses.
